head: 331ddd7 2026-07-14 20:56:52 +0200
branches_note: Default branch is origin/dev (331ddd7). origin/main (1d90dda) and origin/dev carry the same trivial ENG-1968 console-audit-trigger rename via separate PRs (#69 dev / #70 main); chore/reconcile-main-into-dev is merged and 0 ahead. No branch is materially ahead of dev with unmerged feature code — the ENG-2069 nothing-on-main hazard does not apply here.

E1-S1.note: Single-binary Go service with cell-aware /healthz that echoes CellID+ClusterName and fails 503 loud on missing config; fail-fast covered. Caveats vs DoD: the binary is cmd/server (not cmd/console) and the healthz JSON keys are `cell`/`cluster` (not `cell_id`/`cluster_name`) — behaviour matches, field naming differs.

E1-S2.note: go:embed SPA pipeline + one-origin catch-all (never swallows /api) present and tested; secret-free cell bootstrap injected. MISSING: no strict CSP header is set anywhere (grep for Content-Security-Policy/default-src/frame-ancestors finds nothing in Go, HTML, or the httproute manifest) — the 'strict CSP' half of the story is unimplemented.

E1-S3.note: AGPL-import denylist guard (@docmost/*) runs in CI; LGTM read-only credential confined to internal/observability by a package-boundary import test, plus web-side license/edge-confinement specs.

E1-S4.note: cell-lint conformance (always-warm replicas>=2, no-HPA/KEDA, no-temporal-egress, secrets-external, /healthz echo) is present and tested; foreign-cell drop exists on the Kafka audit-event sink via events.ConsumeInCell. MISSING: no cell-guard middleware fronting /api/*, no tenant-move 501 stub route, and no TENANT_MOVE.md.

E1-S5.note: Always-warm multi-replica Deployment (replicas>=2, no HPA/KEDA, enforced by celllint) plus endpoint-as-config cross-cell posture — every sibling reached only through its configured URL, no baked host.

evidence: tests/smoke/smoke_test.go (T1 Redis, T2 stateless-BFF no-Postgres, T3 Redis ops)
E1-S6.note: Redis-only stateless-BFF posture (config + smoke tests asserting no Postgres/Mongo) and the isolated-client honest-render framework (typed per-signal/per-card DegradedError, no cross-panel fate-sharing) are present and tested. MISSING: no dedicated circuit-breaker and no generic Redis state-adapter abstraction — Redis is used directly (go-redis) only for the break-glass rate bucket.

E2-S1.note: lib/auth edge: deny-by-default + Clerk admin-org gate on every admin/workflows route; verifier delegated to orvex-studio-lib (never re-implemented). Fully tested incl. nil-verifier fail-closed and non-admin-org 403.

E2-S2.note: Fresh no-grace introspection on every mutation route + typed per-target confirmation (echo the workflow/resource id) enforced before any upstream call; fail-closed on stale/errored freshness. Tested end-to-end.

E2-S3.note: Operator token forwarded byte-equal to each satellite's own operator surface (no elevated console credential on admin paths); the only standing credential is the read-only LGTM token, confined to internal/observability. Tested.

E2-S4.note: Audit-before-respond mutation wrap where a failed audit write fails the mutation; durable CloudEvents Kafka writer to the family audit stream. Comprehensively tested (unit + integration).

E2-S5.note: Audit browse/search backend (durable Store with actor/satellite/action filtering) present and tested; web AuditViewerPage + retention component + spec exist. GAPS: the web pane is wired to TypedStubAuditListService (honest-empty) not a live BFF client; the audit-pane read is NOT itself audited (only break-glass reads are); tenant-embedded-keys handling not evidenced.

evidence: internal/observability/observability.go (Guardrails, GuardrailError before any backend call)
E3-S1.note: Guardrailed LGTM proxy /api/obs/{logs,metrics,traces,alerts} with FR-CT6 caps (time-range, log-volume, cardinality/response-size) enforced server-side, plus typed degradation. Fully tested.

E3-S2.note: BFF log-search over Loki/LogQL is present and tested (scoped query, guardrail 400, typed 502 degrade). MISSING: no web log-search pane exists (web/src has traces/audit/ai-usage/settings only) — the 'Grafana shell + result pane' UI half is unbuilt.

E3-S3.note: BFF metrics over Mimir/PromQL is present and tested (query shaping, step defaulting, cardinality cap, typed degrade). MISSING: no web metrics/dashboards pane / Grafana-Scenes shell in web/src.

E3-S4.note: Trace lookup + ORIGINAL (AGPL-clean) waterfall renderer present full-stack: BFF Tempo proxy shaping OTLP into gen.TraceResult, plus a hand-built React Waterfall pane with license/edge-confinement specs. Tested both tiers.

E3-S5.note: Cross-signal correlation keyed on the contracts FR-C18 shared-attribute vocabulary (orvex.tenant/cell, service.name, trace id) is present as a pure mapping and tested. MISSING: no web cross-signal pivot UI wiring a log line into the trace pane.

E3-S6.note: BFF alert-state surface over Alertmanager v2 (firing/resolved shaping) is present and tested. MISSING: no web alert-state pane and no links from alerts into the correlated pane.

E3-S7.note: Satellite health board reachability half (per-sibling /healthz fan-out, isolated so one down sibling never blanks another) is present, live, and tested. MISSING: the FR-CT4 Mimir-sourced per-satellite SLI half is explicitly deferred (see health.go comment); no web health-board pane.

evidence: internal/clients/clients.go:268 (Workflows authorizing-proxy client, no temporal-frontend dial)
E4-S1.note: Workflow visibility reads go exclusively through the workflows authorizing proxy with operator-token pass-through; console constructs no Temporal client anywhere (asserted by celllint no-temporal-egress). BFF present and tested. Note: no web workflows-list pane.

E4-S2.note: Workflow write ops (retry/cancel/signal) via the proxy, each behind gate.Mutate (fresh introspection) + typed confirmation + audit-wrap. Fully tested. Note: no web write UI.

E4-S3.note: No workspace/user lifecycle state-machine and no reconcile-drift view anywhere in the tree. admin/identity.go is explicitly read-only ('write half of FR-CT7 does not exist yet'); internal/server/reconcile_test.go is the unrelated M8 route-count reconciliation, not workspace reconciliation.

E5-S1.note: Org/tenant registry browse (read half) present at the BFF with admin-org gating and typed degradation. MISSING: no provisioning-history view, and no web org/tenant registry pane. Write half intentionally deferred (matches story's read-half scope).

E5-S2.note: Token list + revoke (with audit-wrap, operator-surface-not-lifecycle) present and tested. MISSING: no token ROTATE operation, and no web token-management pane (list/inspect/rotate/revoke UI).

E5-S3.note: Knowledge reindex trigger fronted via the FR-K25 wrap: console calls knowledge's own admin surface (knowledge, not console, publishes the spine event), gated + audited + tested. Note: no dedicated web control (would ride a generic action).

E6-S1.note: AI usage & enforcement pane present full-stack: BFF passes ai's FR-AI15 report through verbatim (console stores no cap value), plus a React spend-vs-cap page with cap-math and a spec. Note: the entrypoint wires TypedStubAiUsageService (honest-empty) pending the real ai client swap — the pane renders, live data is one seam swap away.

E6-S2.note: BFF plan/entitlement read+set (billing SoR) and engine F-QUOTA usage read present and gate/audit-tested. MISSING: no web plan/entitlement/quota-usage pane in web/src.

E7-S1.note: Break-glass route class with identity-offline-only verification (orvex-studio-lib offlineauth adapter) separated from the normal Clerk-verified plane; dependency-direction asserted. Present and tested.

E7-S2.note: Break-glass rate-limit (Redis bucket, fails closed), out-of-band alarm on every use, and a bounded action allow-list (satellite actions rejected) — all present and tested.

E8-S1.note: User-Behavior Analytics / PostHog surface is entirely unimplemented: no pkg/posthog port, no /api/analytics/* BFF, no analytics/session-replay/web-analytics web panes, and no posthog dependency in web/package.json. Nothing in the tree references PostHog or UBA.

E8-S2.note: User-Behavior Analytics / PostHog surface is entirely unimplemented: no pkg/posthog port, no /api/analytics/* BFF, no analytics/session-replay/web-analytics web panes, and no posthog dependency in web/package.json. Nothing in the tree references PostHog or UBA.

E8-S3.note: User-Behavior Analytics / PostHog surface is entirely unimplemented: no pkg/posthog port, no /api/analytics/* BFF, no analytics/session-replay/web-analytics web panes, and no posthog dependency in web/package.json. Nothing in the tree references PostHog or UBA.

E8-S4.note: User-Behavior Analytics / PostHog surface is entirely unimplemented: no pkg/posthog port, no /api/analytics/* BFF, no analytics/session-replay/web-analytics web panes, and no posthog dependency in web/package.json. Nothing in the tree references PostHog or UBA.

E8-S5.note: User-Behavior Analytics / PostHog surface is entirely unimplemented: no pkg/posthog port, no /api/analytics/* BFF, no analytics/session-replay/web-analytics web panes, and no posthog dependency in web/package.json. Nothing in the tree references PostHog or UBA.

E8-S6.note: User-Behavior Analytics / PostHog surface is entirely unimplemented: no pkg/posthog port, no /api/analytics/* BFF, no analytics/session-replay/web-analytics web panes, and no posthog dependency in web/package.json. Nothing in the tree references PostHog or UBA.

E8-S7.note: User-Behavior Analytics / PostHog surface is entirely unimplemented: no pkg/posthog port, no /api/analytics/* BFF, no analytics/session-replay/web-analytics web panes, and no posthog dependency in web/package.json. Nothing in the tree references PostHog or UBA.

E8-S8.note: User-Behavior Analytics / PostHog surface is entirely unimplemented: no pkg/posthog port, no /api/analytics/* BFF, no analytics/session-replay/web-analytics web panes, and no posthog dependency in web/package.json. Nothing in the tree references PostHog or UBA.

summary: Console's Go BFF is largely built and well-tested (auth edge, audit-or-fail wrap, LGTM obs proxy with guardrails, workflows authorizing-proxy client, admin composition, break-glass plane): 15 stories present, 12 partial, 9 absent on origin/dev@331ddd7. The dominant gap is the web SPA — only traces, audit, ai-usage and settings panes exist, so most obs/admin stories are BFF-complete but UI-incomplete (partial); the entire E8 PostHog analytics epic and the E4-S3 workspace-lifecycle/reconcile view are absent; E1-S2's strict CSP is unimplemented.
